---
title: "Personnel"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly 
    highlight: tango 
---


<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 40px;">

<div style="flex: 1; padding-right: 20px;">
<img src="images/holding_frog.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 10px;">
</div>

<div style="flex: 2;">
## Sidney Goedeker

Short bio about you. Include your interests, research focus, career goals, etc.

</div>

</div>

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 40px;">

<div style="flex: 1; padding-right: 20px;">
<img src="images/Weston.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 10px;">
</div>

<div style="flex: 2;">
## Weston

Short description about Weston—role, experience, etc.

</div>

</div>
